name: Biscota Thipla Me Marmelada (Sandwich Cookie
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour and baking powder into a large bowl.
2. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients.
3. In another bowl, beat egg yolks with sugar and vanilla extract until smooth.
4. Gradually pour the yolk mixture into the flour mixture, stirring constantly.
5. Add melted butter to the dough and mix until combined.
6. Knead the dough on a floured surface until it forms a soft, pliable ball (about 10 minutes).
7. Let the dough rest for 10 minutes.
8. Divide the dough into four equal parts.
9. Roll each portion of dough out to a thickness of about 1/4 inch.
10. Cut the rolled dough into rounds using a cookie cutter.
11. Place the cookies on a baking sheet coated with butter.
12. Beat egg whites until stiff peaks form, then lightly brush over the cookies.
13. Press half an almond into the center of each cookie.
14. Preheat the oven to 300°F (150°C).
15. Bake the cookies for about 15 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
16. Remove from the oven and let cool completely on a wire rack.
17. Spread a small amount of marmalade onto half of the cooled cookies.
18. Place the remaining cookies on top to form sandwich-style treats.
19. Serve immediately.
